sentences.arabic: نَظَّمَ الْهِلَالُ الْأَحْمَرُ حَمْلَةً لِلتَّبَرُّعِ بِالدَّمِ فِي عِدَّةِ مُدُنٍ.
sentences.translation: Crveni polumjesec organizovao je kampanju darivanja krvi u nekoliko gradova.
sentences.translationEn: The Red Crescent organised a blood donation campaign in several cities.

sentences.arabic: أَقْبَلَ الْمَوَاطِنُونَ بِأَعْدَادٍ كَبِيرَةٍ عَلَى مَرَاكِزِ التَّبَرُّعِ.
sentences.translation: Građani su u velikom broju dolazili u centre za darivanje.
sentences.translationEn: Citizens came in large numbers to the donation centres.

sentences.arabic: أَكَّدَ الْأَطِبَّاءُ أَنَّ بَنْكَ الدَّمِ كَانَ بِحَاجَةٍ مَاسَّةٍ إِلَى تَجْدِيدِ مَخْزُونِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari su potvrdili da je banci krvi hitno trebalo popuniti zalihe.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors confirmed that the blood bank was in urgent need of replenishing its stock.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ أَحَدُ الْمُتَبَرِّعِينَ إِنَّ الْإِنْسَانَ يَشْعُرُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ حِينَ يُسَاعِدُ غَيْرَهُ.
sentences.translation: Jedan od davalaca krvi rekao je da čovjek osjeća sreću kada pomaže drugima.
sentences.translationEn: One donor said that a person feels happy when they help others.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَ مَسْؤُولُو الصِّحَّةِ الْجَمِيعَ وَدَعَوْا إِلَى تَكْرَارِ هَذِهِ الْحَمْلَةِ كُلَّ ثَلَاثَةِ أَشْهُرٍ.
sentences.translation: Zdravstveni zvaničnici zahvalili su svima i pozvali na ponavljanje ove kampanje svaka tri mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: Health officials thanked everyone and called for the campaign to be repeated every three months.
